issue_title: When modifying the basic information, dragging and uploading pictures does not take effect
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 进入基本信息编辑页面，尝试通过拖拽方式上传图片到指定区域，观察图片是否成功上传并显示预览。
expected_result_zh: 拖拽图片到上传区域后，图片应成功上传并在页面上正确显示预览，基本信息中的图片字段应更新为新上传的图片。
